text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you on the team — jump in and make yourself at home!
Hey guide_sam, welcome aboard! You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to seeing what you bring to the community!
Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be a huge asset to the community — great to have you here!
